title: Democrats May Sue Trump Over 'Illegal' Iran War
snippet: Multiple Democrats tell TIME they may take Trump to court if war continues past May 1 WPR deadline. Sen. Blumenthal: 'Legal action has to be explored.' Day 60 of military campaign reached April 29.
tag_reason: WPR update: Day 60 reached, lawsuit threat is new escalation beyond 4/28 legal showdown framing
